rationale: The synthetic ensures is `H ==> det_push_equal`, so each per-run ensures conjunct (including `post*_@ == pre_@.push(*new_value)` and `post*_self_.wf()`) is NOT a free hypothesis at the prelude position — which is precisely why the previous attempt's bare top-level asserts failed and the `get_node_ref` recommends went unmet. Wrap the proof in a proof-mode `if` on the full antecedent so each conjunct of H is on the path condition inside the branch; then close `view() == view()` via Seq `=~=` (encapsulated in `lemma_push_view_eq`), align the two `forall|v|` get_node_ref preservation ensures pointwise through an explicit shared trigger (encapsulated in `lemma_push_get_node_ref_preserved`), and emit `wf_to_no_duplicates` on both posts so z3 has the structural `no_duplicates` facts on the shared spec_seq.
